scripts.build: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.unobfuscated.cjs && javascript-obfuscator dist/server.unobfuscated.cjs --output dist/server.cjs --target node --string-array true --dead-code-injection true --control-flow-flattening true --compact true
scripts.build:exe: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/server.exe.cjs && pkg dist/server.exe.cjs --targets node18-win-x64,node18-macos-x64 --output TiktokEngine
